message:
feat: wire ContextStrategy into Session

Route context management through the ContextStrategy interface instead
of calling contextMgr.MaybeCompact() directly. Add AfterAction hook
after each completed tool round. Strategy is selected via
SessionConfig.ContextStrategy (default: "compact") and tools from the
strategy are registered at session startup. Both NewSession and
RestoreSession use the same strategy creation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
